title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 411.750 - Safe working conditions to be maintained
text:
411.750.  Safe working conditions to be maintained. — It is the responsibility of any person licensed under this chapter, and any person requesting services of any employee of the department, to provide at all times safe working conditions while the employee is performing requested or required duties as an employee of the department.
(L. 1977 S.B. 75 § 14)
